title: Lead SEO Specialist at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited!
